'''dhasulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headbanger|headbanger]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headbanger|headbanger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhasulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæsilith|dhæsilith]] || [[word:dhæsilij|dhæsilij]] || [[word:dhæsilish|dhæsilish]] || [[word:dhæsili|dhæsili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasusuluth|dhasusuluth]] || [[word:dhasusuluj|dhasusuluj]] || [[word:dhasusulush|dhasusulush]] || [[word:dhasusulu|dhasusulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasuluth|dhasuluth]] || [[word:dhasuluj|dhasuluj]] || [[word:dhasulush|dhasulush]] || [[word:dhasulu|dhasulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasufluth|dhasufluth]] || [[word:dhasufluj|dhasufluj]] || [[word:dhasuflush|dhasuflush]] || [[word:dhasufluf|dhasufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhasuluthu|dhasuluthu]] || [[word:dhasuluju|dhasuluju]] || [[word:dhasulushu|dhasulushu]] || [[word:dhasuluku|dhasuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhasuluth|dhasuluth]] || [[word:dhasuluj|dhasuluj]] || [[word:dhasulush|dhasulush]] || [[word:dhasulu|dhasulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhasuluthul|dhasuluthul]] || [[word:dhasulujul|dhasulujul]] || [[word:dhasulushul|dhasulushul]] || [[word:dhasulukul|dhasulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhasuluthuthu|dhasuluthuthu]] || [[word:dhasulujuju|dhasulujuju]] || [[word:dhasulushushu|dhasulushushu]] || [[word:dhasuluku|dhasuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhasuluthun|dhasuluthun]] || [[word:dhasulujun|dhasulujun]] || [[word:dhasulushun|dhasulushun]] || [[word:dhasulukun|dhasulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhasuluthuoro|dhasuluthuoro]] || [[word:dhasulujuoro|dhasulujuoro]] || [[word:dhasulushuoro|dhasulushuoro]] || [[word:dhasulukuoro|dhasulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
